title: tithymalus cybirensis
intro: Tithymalus cybirensis, also known as the Cypriot spurge, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from the sap of its latex-filled stems. The health benefits of Tithymalus cybirensis include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which are used topically to treat various health conditions.
